steps.name: create-branch
steps.description: Create task/t0030_distal_dendrite_diameter_sweep_dsgc branch and worktree from main.

steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify t0022 dependency is completed and inspect its outputs.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create task folder structure (code, data, plan, research, results, logs).

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: t0027 morphology-DS synthesis already covers Schachter2010 and passive-filtering priors.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: no new external information required; mechanism priors already in t0027.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Read t0022 testbed code to identify distal dendritic sections and the 12-direction tuning protocol entry point; locate t0012 DSI scoring library.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Design the diameter-sweep driver, selection rule for distal branches, protocol per diameter value, and DSI-vs-diameter analysis.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: runs entirely on the local Windows workstation via NEURON + Python.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Copy relevant t0022 scripts into code/, write diameter-sweep driver, run the 7-value sweep under the standard 12-direction protocol, save per-sweep-point CSV, generate DSI-vs-diameter plot.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote machines to tear down.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: task scope is a prescribed single-axis sweep; alternative approaches are not in scope.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md (per-direction breakdown, slope-sign classification, mechanism discussion), metrics.json, costs.json, remote_machines_used.json.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Compare DSI-vs-diameter slope sign and magnitude to Schachter2010 active-dendrite predictions and passive-filtering alternative predictions.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Write suggestions.json with follow-up experiments motivated by the diameter-sweep findings.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, finalise task.json, prepare PR, merge, overview refresh.
